expectations.text: Output contains a BaseTool subclass with onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, and drawOverlay methods
expectations.evidence: ArcWallTool class extends BaseTool and implements all four methods explicitly

expectations.text: drawArcWall rendering function uses ctx.arc(), ctx.arcTo(), or bezierCurveTo() — not a straight lineTo()
expectations.evidence: drawArcWall calls ctx.arc() twice (outer and inner arc radii) to form the filled wall band

expectations.text: JSON wall schema includes start, end, midpoint (or controlPoint), thickness, and type fields
expectations.evidence: Schema includes start, end, mid, thickness, type:'arc', wallType, and computed center/radius/angles

expectations.text: Exterior wall color #2C2C2C and interior #555555 (or equivalent project palette) used in drawArcWall
Math.round() or integer pixel coords used for canvas drawing (Hi-DPI / sub-pixel awareness)
expectations.evidence: Math.round() applied to cx, cy, rOuter, rInner and all canvas coordinates throughout

expectations.text: ctx.save() and ctx.restore() bracket the drawing operations
expectations.evidence: ctx.save() at top and ctx.restore() at bottom of drawArcWall and drawOverlay

expectations.text: Three-click workflow correctly staged: start, end, arc midpoint (or equivalent two-phase approach)
expectations.evidence: Phase state machine: idle → hasStart (click 1) → hasEnd (click 2) → commit on click 3 (midpoint)
